mapper.select:
SELECT notice_no , notice_type , notice_title , notice_content , notice_adddate , notice_upddate , notice_cnt , notice_admin_id , notice_pin_yn , notice_use_yn FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY CASE notice_pin_yn WHEN 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END , notice_adddate DESC , notice_no DESC ) AS RN , notice_no , NVL(notice_type, 'NOTICE') AS NOTICE_TYPE , notice_title , notice_content , TO_CHAR(notice_adddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS NOTICE_ADDDATE , TO_CHAR(notice_upddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS NOTICE_UPDDATE , NVL(notice_cnt, 0) AS NOTICE_CNT , notice_admin_id , NVL(notice_pin_yn, 'N') AS NOTICE_PIN_YN , NVL(notice_use_yn, 'Y') AS NOTICE_USE_YN FROM notice
) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow} ORDER BY RN

SELECT notice_no , NVL(notice_type, 'NOTICE') AS NOTICE_TYPE , notice_title , notice_content , TO_CHAR(notice_adddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS NOTICE_ADDDATE , TO_CHAR(notice_upddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS NOTICE_UPDDATE , NVL(notice_cnt, 0) AS NOTICE_CNT , notice_admin_id , NVL(notice_pin_yn, 'N') AS NOTICE_PIN_YN , NVL(notice_use_yn, 'Y') AS NOTICE_USE_YN FROM notice WHERE notice_no = #{noticeNo}
